spec.action_partition_description: ordered iterated noisy-rate blocks; tier 1 matches the one-drop source selection and later tiers resample quotient representatives
spec.expected_compression_target: iterated 1/18 quotient blocks until degenerate or terminal tier
spec.leakage_risk_statement: Uses only stable instance id, schema seed, selector rule id, and edge identities; it does not use rewards, terminal outcomes, learned values, or future episode results.
spec.state_partition_description: identity state keys at tier 0; runtime contraction is edge-driven
